title: Wire remaining dashboard server actions to Prisma
description: getAnalyticDashboard fully working — fixed null dates in 8,750 PageEvent records (copied createdAt→date). Dashboard shows real views/likes/shares with period filtering. Remaining: getEcommerceDashboard, getProjectDashboard, getMarketingDashboard still import from mock data.

title: Wire chat, mail, calendar, scrumboard to Prisma
description: Chat and Mail fully wired to Prisma with full CRUD, contacts from Users+Customers, seed data, file attachments in mail, label move fix. Remaining: getCalendar, getScrumboardData still use mock data.

title: Wire help center & RBAC to Prisma
description: getPricingPlans, getRolesPermissionsRoles, getRolesPermissionsUsers done. Remaining: getManageArticle, getArticle still use mock data.

title: Add POST/PUT/DELETE API routes for all entities
description: Full CRUD via REST for customers, products, invoices. Remaining: projects, contacts.

title: Create versioned API routes for frontend integration
description: Add /api/v1/* routes with CORS, JWT auth, and consistent response format for the public trtmaroc.com frontend.

title: Add Prisma models for Chat, Mail, Calendar, Invoice
description: Added ChatConversation, ChatMessage, MailMessage, CalendarEvent, Invoice, InvoiceItem, Employee to schema.

title: TRT Maroc branding
description: Logos, app name, meta tags, and favicon all replaced and driven by env vars (NEXT_PUBLIC_LOGO_LIGHT, NEXT_PUBLIC_LOGO_DARK, NEXT_PUBLIC_FAVICON). Logo component, landing pages, invoice PDF, and page-meta all read from env. Easy to swap by editing .env.

title: Arabic & French localization
description: Complete Arabic translations (priority), add French translations (messages/fr.json). Test RTL layout.

title: Invoice & Devis module
description: Invoice/Devis fully redesigned with professional TRT Digital branded template. Auto-numbering FA-NNN/MM/YYYY with number decrement on delete. Recurring invoice toggle with auto-create next invoice on payment. Payment tracking (method, amount, date). List with sortable columns, bulk select/delete. Invoice dashboard with stat cards, period filtering (day/week/month/quarter/year), top countries map, and chart. PDF with base64 logo fix and improved layout. Drag-to-reorder items in form. Customer list shows paid/unpaid invoice counts. RBAC permissions (invoices.read/write/delete).

title: File upload integration
description: Implement file upload for product images, customer avatars, file manager. Support local or S3/Cloudinary.

title: Enable role-based access control in middleware
description: RBAC enabled in middleware.js with dynamic route matching. Granular authority built from role accessRight on login. Nav items and route configs use permissions. Role management UI already done.

title: Fix PrismaClient initialization error
description: Runtime PrismaClientInitializationError — PrismaClient needs valid options. Fixed: created .env with DATABASE_URL, split auth.config.js for edge runtime. User must add real MongoDB connection string.

title: Add Prisma models for website integration
description: Added PageStat, PageEvent, Comment, Submission, ErrorLog, CalendarEvent, MailMessage, ChatConversation, ChatMessage, Invoice, InvoiceItem, Employee models to schema.

title: Build /api/v1/* public endpoints for frontend
description: Create versioned API routes: views, likes, shares, interactions, comments, comment-likes, submissions, newsletter, leads, 404-log. Must match frontend response shapes exactly.

title: Build /api/v1/admin/* endpoints for frontend
description: Create admin API routes: analytics, google, errors, indexing, index-url, notifications, stats, export. Must match frontend response shapes from architecture report.

title: Integrate Google APIs (GA4 + Search Console + Indexing)
description: All Google API functions ported to src/lib/google-apis.js (GA4 visitors, SC keywords, search traffic, top pages, devices, countries, indexing). Server action getGoogleAnalytics.js fetches all in parallel. Analytics dashboard has 3 tabs: Analytics, Google, Indexing. POST /api/google/index-url for requesting indexing/removal. Requires 4 env vars to activate.

title: Page Stats section, Indexing/Changelog pagination, Submissions & 404 API
description: Added PageStats component with server-side pagination and sortable columns (views/likes/shares/AI). AI column sums aiClicks embedded object (chatgpt/gemini/claude/perplexity/grok) from PageStat. Added aiClicks Json field to Prisma schema. Indexing tab now has client-side pagination (15/page). Changelog API supports ?page&limit params, frontend uses Pagination component with tab switching fix. Created POST/GET /api/submissions, PATCH /api/submissions/:id, POST /api/404-log, GET /api/admin/errors with CORS, rate limiting, dedup, and admin auth.

title: Redirects & 404 error management system
description: Added Redirect model and updated ErrorLog to aggregate by path with hitCount. CRUD API for redirects with CORS. Redirects tab in Analytics dashboard and standalone page at /dashboards/redirects under Dashboard menu. POST /api/404-log now upserts by path.

title: SMTP email notifications for form submissions
description: Send HTML email via nodemailer when a form is submitted. Fire-and-forget pattern. Requires SMTP_HOST, SMTP_PORT, SMTP_USER, SMTP_PASS, SMTP_TO env vars.

title: CORS middleware for /api/v1/* routes
description: Add CORS headers allowing requests from FRONTEND_URL (trtmaroc.com). Only applies to versioned API routes, not internal dashboard routes.

title: Rate limiting with Redis or in-memory
description: Implement rate limiting matching frontend specs: views 5s, likes 5s, shares 5s, comments 10s, submissions 30s, admin login 60s/5 attempts.

title: Data migration script: Netlify Blobs → MongoDB
description: Script to import existing data from frontend JSON files (views, likes, shares, comments, submissions, 404s, events) into MongoDB collections.

title: Settings page: wire all tabs to database with full CRUD
description: All 4 settings tabs (profile, security, notification, billing/integration) use mock data. Need: 1) Add UserSettings/UserProfile Prisma model, 2) Rewrite API routes to use Prisma instead of mock, 3) Add PUT endpoints for saving, 4) Wire form onSubmit to real API calls. All fields must persist to MongoDB.
